title: filaginella luteoalba
intro: Filaginella luteoalba, also known as the Desert-thyme or White-leaved filaginella, is a small, succulent plant native to Africa and the Middle East, belonging to the family Plumbaginaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Filaginella luteoalba include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce fever, and support respiratory health. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and stems can be used fresh or dried for various medicinal purposes.
